title: Distributed propulsion system architecture document
description: Produce system architecture document for N motor-propulsor distributed propulsion system covering DC bus topology motor-out logic and rotor configurations 4–18
notes: ATA 61+71; shared with Q100 BWB programme

title: Motor-out safety analysis
description: Perform FHA and FMEA for motor-out scenarios demonstrating continued safe flight and landing capability per ARP4761A

title: Power management unit architecture specification
description: Define power management unit architecture for battery-dominant primary power with transient buffer management covering VTOL and cruise modes
notes: ATA 24; spillover to Q100 H2 FC power management

title: Battery peak buffering trade study
description: Trade study on battery buffer sizing for peak power demands during vertical climb transition and emergency power modes

title: Battery thermal management system specification
description: Specification for battery thermal runaway containment system and State of Health tracking model per EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542
notes: ATA 96; EU Battery Reg DPP compliance

title: SoH degradation model and DPP implementation
description: Develop battery State of Health degradation model and implement Digital Product Passport data model per EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542 Article 14
notes: DPP enables end-of-life battery traceability and recycling compliance

title: Motor controller software plan DO-178C
description: Plan for DO-178C DAL A/B motor controller software development covering requirements capture design coding verification and validation
notes: DO-178C; shared methodology with Q100 BWB

title: Motor controller hardware plan DO-254
description: Plan for DO-254 DAL A/B motor controller hardware development covering design capture verification and production transition
notes: DO-254; shared methodology with Q100 BWB

title: SC-VTOL certification basis document
description: Produce certification basis document for SC-VTOL type certificate application identifying applicable special conditions and means of compliance
notes: SC-VTOL type certificate application gate M2

title: EASA Issue Papers and Special Conditions tracker
description: Track and resolve EASA Issue Papers specific to AAM/UAM eVTOL certification; precedent analysis for Q100 CS-25+SC pathway
